message:
test(backpressure): add 18 tests for tier serde, config, classify boundaries, and pane management

Cover tier serde roundtrip/snake_case, config serde roundtrip and partial
JSON defaults, classify boundary conditions (just below thresholds, both
queues elevated, saturation boundaries), queue depths edge cases, multiple
upgrade transitions, pane management idempotency, config accessor methods,
and snapshot edge cases. Expands module from 22 to 40 tests.

Contributes to wa-1u90p.7.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
